title.en: An ancient demon appeared on the first layer, s...

content.en:
Rumble!!!

An ancient demon appeared on the first layer, surrounding Ye Tian.

This is the ancient demon bred by the ancient magic tower, all of them are strong in the flesh, and they are good at the ancient demon combat skills, although they do not pass through the law avenue and the secret skills of the supernatural powers, but the ancient magic tower prohibits the laws, supernatural powers, and secret techniques, and only allows all kinds of physical combat skills, so the ancient demons here are very terrifying.

The ancient demons of the first layer are only weaker ancient demons, but the general earth venerable is also not their opponent on the first layer of the ancient demon tower, not to mention that there are ten ancient demons as soon as they appear.

These ten ancient demons are good at different combat skills, once combined, there are almost no flaws, even if it is a six- or seven-star earth venerable, if it is weak in physical aspects, it is estimated that it will not be able to break through the first layer.

Ye Tian did not defeat these ancient demons at the beginning, but hid his strength and fought with them for a while, and found that their combat skills were far inferior to those powerful source people in the source land, so he was extremely disappointed and killed them one by one.

"It seems that there is no way to learn more advanced combat skills in the Ancient Demon Tower, it seems that I can only break through the level, absorb some more refined ancient demon vitality, and improve my strength!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he still had an idea, that is, to break through the thirteenth layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, completely refine the Ancient Demon Tower, and take this place for himself.

But this is not a simple matter, and with Ye Tian's level, it is estimated that it will be far from being able to do it.

He will do his best, though.

Rumble!!!

The last ancient demon was killed by Ye Tian, and the first layer of the ancient demon tower broke through.

At this moment, a black hole appeared above Ye Tian, and the incomparably pure ancient demon vitality poured down, pouring into Ye Tian's body, refining his body.

Ye Tian didn't dare to waste time, and hurriedly ran the Xuanxu Technique to refine his body.

Not long after, a terrifying aura erupted from Ye Tian's body.

He, broke through!

Strictly speaking, it was the Xuanxuan Jue that made a small breakthrough, directly from the third layer of the Xuanxu Jue Xiaocheng to the Dacheng realm, and the physical body transformed again.

"The ancient demon vitality is a hundred times purer than the ancient demon vitality in the outside world, and it is definitely the top physical body cultivation resource!

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, his strength was already infinitely close to that of a two-star peak god general, and if he cultivated the Xuan Xuan Jue to the third level of the Great Perfection realm, his strength could definitely be improved to the combat power of a two-star extreme god general.

It takes a long time, though.

But if he keeps going through and breaks through some more levels in the Ancient Demon Tower, maybe he can break through in a short time.

"The Ancient Demon Tower is really my blessed land!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Wow!

Ye Tian's figure disappeared from the first layer and entered the second layer.

The second layer of ancient demons is even more difficult, the physical strength of each ancient demon is far beyond that of the first layer of ancient demons, and the combat skills they have are even more exquisite and powerful, and the combined power is even far beyond that of the ordinary ten-star Earth Venerable.

According to Ye Tian's intelligence, only a very small number of ten-star earth lords and one-star god generals are expected to break through the second layer, and only those two-star god generals who break through the third layer are those two-star god generals.

Second floor.

Ye Tian continued to fight with the ten ancient demons, and it didn't take long to kill the ten ancient demons, and at this time, the pure ancient demon essence came again, pouring into Ye Tian's body, refining the flesh.

After a while, Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Jue improved again, but he still failed to break the bottleneck.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian entered the third layer and began to fight with the ancient demons of the third layer.

The attainments of the ancient demons at this level in combat skills made Ye Tian pay a little attention, at least they were not rubbish, and they had reached the level of some people who were not weak in the source area, but it was a pity that they were still at the level of surface combat skills, and they did not reach the level of entering the avenue with skills.

Of course, for the other Earth Lords and Divine Generals, this ancient demon's combat skills were incomparably profound, and they were worth learning for a long time.

It's just that Ye Tian is too rebellious, he has entered the source land, learned a higher level of origin avenue and rules, and completely transcended the ordinary rules, in the realm, Ye Tian is too advanced, so it is too easy to learn these combat skills.

Other people don't have Ye Tian's experience and talent, so naturally they can't compare with Ye Tian.

Although the combat skills of the third-layer ancient demons were good, they were not worth Ye Tian to learn more, so Ye Tian quickly killed them and broke through the third-layer.

Using the ancient demon essence rewarded by the third layer, Ye Tian's Xuanxu Jue has improved again, and he is only one step away from the consummation of the third layer of Xuanxu Jue, and he still needs to break through the fourth layer, then he can completely break the shackles.

Fourth floor!

Ye Tian came here, and the ancient demons that appeared here were even more terrifying, in terms of pure physical strength, each of them was not weaker than Ye Tian, and the power of the union was even more terrifying.

I'm afraid that some weaker three-star gods will not necessarily be able to break through here, and only the stronger three-star gods will be able to pass.

However, the Ancient Demon Tower is not a competition for strength, but a competition for physical strength and combat skills, if the combat skills are exquisite, and the physical strength is weaker, it doesn't matter.

Ye Tian's combat skills far surpassed those of the ancient demons, so he was not intimidated at all.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought with the fourth-layer ancient demons, and fought against ten powerful ancient demons with weakness, and the entire fourth-layer was completely on their battlefield, purely with the strength of his physical combat skills, shaking the rules of the ancient demon tower.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was a little weak, but soon Ye Tian took advantage of it strongly, constantly smashing the cooperation between the ten ancient demons, and killing the ancient demons one by one, and finally broke through the fourth layer.

As soon as the fourth layer passed, the Ancient Demon Essence Yuan that far surpassed the previous one poured into Ye Tian's body.

A great metamorphosis is coming!

Spallation!

A real metamorphosis!

Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Jue quickly stepped into the third-layer consummation realm, and the strength of his physical body increased by a large margin, and his strength skyrocketed to the two-star peak realm.

"The strength has undergone a great transformation! This time it's the right time to come to the Ancient Demon Cave! The Cangyu Universe is really extraordinary, there are such treasures, if the Eternal Universe also has such cultivation treasures, some god-level powerhouses would have been born long ago!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, he truly understood that the real gap between the two universes was not the inheritance gap, nor the talent gap, but the resource gap.

The origin of the Cangyu universe should be much stronger than the origin of the eternal universe, so it can give birth to some of the more powerful treasures and cultivation treasures that are against the sky, and because of this, the Cangyu universe can give birth to god-level powerhouses.

And now, with the advent of the Dual Universe Era, the origins of the two universes have sensed the crisis, and they have opened some secret realms and cultivation treasures again.

The Ancient Demon Cave is one of them.

And the Eternal Universe is still a little bit, and a similar cultivation treasure land has not yet been opened.

But it won't be long before a series of cultivation treasures will definitely erupt in the two universes, causing the two universes to usher in a cultivation boom.

The essence of the thirteen cosmic epochs exploded at once, and if it didn't succeed, it would become benevolent.

"The era of the dual universe is really against the sky, the probability of detachment is probably dozens or even a hundred times higher than usual, even if the fusion of the dual universe fails this time, before the dual universe is broken, I am afraid that more than double digit transcendents can be born. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But it's not worth it to say, if the two universes don't merge and continue to exist, the long universe era, there are definitely a lot of transcendents born, and now the foundation of the two universes has been exhausted at one time, plus betting on the future of the two universes, in the long run, it is definitely not worth it.

But for the creatures of this era, it's certainly worth it.

For example, what does the future cosmic epoch have to do with the beings of this era? They only grasp the present, and if there is a higher chance of transcendence, they are willing to give everything.

But if Ye Tian was allowed to choose, he would rather the two universes not merge, because there was not much time left for him now, and he still hadn't figured out how to make his wife and sister transcend.

If they don't detach, if the universe fails to merge and shatter, they will really die!

"The next goal is to step into the three-star god general and become an official disciple of the master!"

Ye Tian decided.
